name: smoke: full EU en React (dry-run)
cmd: yarn manager-generator --non-interactive --dry-run   --appName demo --appType full   --universe Manager --subUniverse Manager   --region EU --flavor generic --language en --framework React   --mainApiPath /me --listingEndpointPath /me --dashboardEndpointPath /me   --out "{OUT}"

name: type: pci EU en React (dry-run)
cmd: yarn manager-generator --non-interactive --dry-run   --appName demo-pci --appType pci   --universe Manager --subUniverse Manager   --region EU --flavor generic --language en --framework React   --mainApiPath /me --listingEndpointPath /me/list --dashboardEndpointPath /me/details   --out "{OUT}"

name: invalid region (should fail)
cmd: yarn manager-generator --non-interactive --dry-run   --appName bad-region --appType full   --universe Manager --subUniverse Manager   --region MARS --flavor generic --language en --framework React   --mainApiPath /me --listingEndpointPath /me --dashboardEndpointPath /me   --out "{OUT}"
expectStderrRegex: region must be one of: CA, EU, US

name: missing mainApiPath (should fail)
cmd: yarn manager-generator --non-interactive --dry-run   --appName missing-api --appType full   --universe Manager --subUniverse Manager   --region EU --flavor generic --language en --framework React   --listingEndpointPath /me --dashboardEndpointPath /me   --out "{OUT}"
expectStderrRegex: (mainApiPath.*(required|min|must start))|Invalid input: expected string, received undefined

name: existing non-empty out dir (dry-run)
cmd: OUTDIR="{OUT}"; touch "$OUTDIR/.keep"; yarn manager-generator --non-interactive --dry-run   --appName exists-dir --appType full   --universe Manager --subUniverse Manager   --region EU --flavor generic --language en --framework React   --mainApiPath /me --listingEndpointPath /me --dashboardEndpointPath /me   --out "$OUTDIR"

name: real run writes files
cmd: yarn manager-generator --non-interactive   --appName realrun --appType full   --universe Manager --subUniverse Manager   --region EU --flavor generic --language en --framework React   --mainApiPath /me --listingEndpointPath /me --dashboardEndpointPath /me   --out "{OUT}" && test -n "$(find '{OUT}' -mindepth 1 -print -quit)"

name: invalid appType (should fail)
cmd: yarn manager-generator --non-interactive --dry-run   --appName bad-type --appType nonsense   --universe Manager --subUniverse Manager   --region EU --flavor generic --language en --framework React   --mainApiPath /me --listingEndpointPath /me --dashboardEndpointPath /me   --out "{OUT}"

name: api path must start with slash (should fail)
cmd: yarn manager-generator --non-interactive --dry-run --appName bad-path --appType full --universe Manager --subUniverse Manager --region EU --flavor generic --language en --framework React --mainApiPath me --listingEndpointPath /me --dashboardEndpointPath /me --out "{OUT}"

name: dry-run: no unresolved tokens
cmd: yarn manager-generator --non-interactive --dry-run   --appName tokencheck --appType full   --universe Manager --subUniverse Manager   --region EU --flavor generic --language en --framework React   --mainApiPath /me --listingEndpointPath /v2/users/list --dashboardEndpointPath /v2/users/details   --out "{OUT}"

name: serviceKey derived from listingEndpointPath
cmd: yarn manager-generator --non-interactive --dry-run   --appName svc-deriv --appType full   --universe Manager --subUniverse Manager   --region EU --flavor generic --language en --framework React   --mainApiPath /me --listingEndpointPath /v2/users/list --dashboardEndpointPath /v2/users/details   --out "{OUT}"

name: serviceKey fallback when listing is '/'
cmd: yarn manager-generator --non-interactive --dry-run --appName My-App --appType full --universe Manager --subUniverse Manager --region EU --flavor generic --language en --framework React --mainApiPath /me --listingEndpointPath / --dashboardEndpointPath /me/details --out "{OUT}"

name: isPci renders boolean (unquoted)
cmd: OUT="{OUT}"; yarn manager-generator --non-interactive --appName pci-demo --appType pci --universe Manager --subUniverse Manager --region EU --flavor generic --language en --framework React --mainApiPath /me --listingEndpointPath /me/list --dashboardEndpointPath /me/details --out "$OUT" && grep -E 'isPci:[[:space:]]*true' "$OUT/src/App.constants.ts"

name: isPci boolean present in App.constants.ts only
cmd: OUT="{OUT}"; yarn manager-generator --non-interactive --appName pci-demo-2 --appType pci --universe Manager --subUniverse Manager --region EU --flavor generic --language en --framework React --mainApiPath /me --listingEndpointPath /me/list --dashboardEndpointPath /me/details --out "$OUT" && grep -E 'isPci:[[:space:]]*true([^A-Za-z_]|$)' "$OUT/src/App.constants.ts"

name: idempotency: real run twice produces stable file count
cmd: OUT="{OUT}"; yarn manager-generator --non-interactive   --appName idem --appType full   --universe Manager --subUniverse Manager   --region EU --flavor generic --language en --framework React   --mainApiPath /me --listingEndpointPath /me --dashboardEndpointPath /me   --out "$OUT" && C1=$(find "$OUT" -type f | wc -l | tr -d ' ') && yarn manager-generator --non-interactive   --appName idem --appType full   --universe Manager --subUniverse Manager   --region EU --flavor generic --language en --framework React   --mainApiPath /me --listingEndpointPath /me --dashboardEndpointPath /me   --out "$OUT" && C2=$(find "$OUT" -type f | wc -l | tr -d ' ') && test "$C1" -eq "$C2"

name: real run: required files exist in folder
cmd: OUT="{OUT}"; yarn manager-generator --non-interactive   --appName realfiles --appType full   --universe Manager --subUniverse Manager   --region EU --flavor generic --language en --framework React   --mainApiPath /me --listingEndpointPath /me --dashboardEndpointPath /me   --out "$OUT" && test -f "$OUT/package.json" && test -f "$OUT/src/App.constants.ts" && test -f "$OUT/src/routes/Routes.tsx"

name: real run uses default OUTPUT_BASE_DIR
cmd: yarn manager-generator --non-interactive --appName default-out-test --appType full --universe Manager --subUniverse Manager --region EU --flavor generic --language en --framework React --mainApiPath /me --listingEndpointPath /me --dashboardEndpointPath /me && test -f ./packages/manager/apps/default-out-test/package.json

name: v6-only → listingApi v6Iceberg, onboardingApi v6
cmd:
OUT="{OUT}"; JSON_FILE=$(mktemp); cat > "$JSON_FILE" <<'JSON'
{"apiV6Endpoints":{"get":{"operationList":[{"apiPath":"/dns/zone"}]}},"apiV2Endpoints":{"get":{"operationList":[]}}}
JSON
export MGR_GEN_INJECT_JSON="$(cat "$JSON_FILE")"; yarn manager-generator --non-interactive --appName v6-app --appType full --universe Hub --subUniverse Hub --region EU --flavor generic --language en --framework React --mainApiPath /dns --listingEndpointPath /dns/zone --dashboardEndpointPath /dns/zone --out "$OUT" && grep -E "listingApi:[[:space:]]*'v6Iceberg'" "$OUT/src/App.constants.ts" && grep -E "onboardingApi:[[:space:]]*'v6'" "$OUT/src/App.constants.ts"; RC=$?; rm -f "$JSON_FILE"; exit $RC

name: mix v6 present but listing in v2 → onboardingApi v2
cmd:
OUT="{OUT}"; JSON_FILE=$(mktemp); cat > "$JSON_FILE" <<'JSON'
{"apiV6Endpoints":{"get":{"operationList":[{"apiPath":"/domain/v6only"}]}},"apiV2Endpoints":{"get":{"operationList":[{"apiPath":"/domain"}]}}}
JSON
export MGR_GEN_INJECT_JSON="$(cat "$JSON_FILE")"; yarn manager-generator --non-interactive --appName mix-app --appType full --universe Manager --subUniverse Manager --region EU --flavor generic --language en --framework React --mainApiPath /domain --listingEndpointPath /domain --dashboardEndpointPath /domain --out "$OUT" && grep -E "listingApi:[[:space:]]*'v6Iceberg'" "$OUT/src/App.constants.ts" && grep -E "onboardingApi:[[:space:]]*'v2'" "$OUT/src/App.constants.ts"; RC=$?; rm -f "$JSON_FILE"; exit $RC

name: combined endpoint split (brace-aware detection)
cmd:
OUT="{OUT}"; JSON_FILE=$(mktemp); cat > "$JSON_FILE" <<'JSON'
{"apiV6Endpoints":{"get":{"operationList":[{"apiPath":"/cloud/project/{serviceName}"}]}},"apiV2Endpoints":{"get":{"operationList":[]}}}
JSON
export MGR_GEN_INJECT_JSON="$(cat "$JSON_FILE")"; yarn manager-generator --non-interactive --appName combo --appType full --universe Manager --subUniverse Manager --region EU --flavor generic --language en --framework React --mainApiPath /cloud --listingEndpointPath '/cloud/project/{serviceName}-getProject' --dashboardEndpointPath '/cloud/project/{serviceName}-getProject' --out "$OUT" && grep -E "listingApi:[[:space:]]*'v6Iceberg'" "$OUT/src/App.constants.ts" && grep -E "onboardingApi:[[:space:]]*'v6'" "$OUT/src/App.constants.ts" && grep -E "serviceKey:[[:space:]]*'cloud-project-serviceName'" "$OUT/src/App.constants.ts"; RC=$?; rm -f "$JSON_FILE"; exit $RC

name: strip version prefix in mainApiPath (assert via serviceKey)
cmd: OUT="{OUT}"; yarn manager-generator --non-interactive --appName strip-v6 --appType full --universe Manager --subUniverse Manager --region EU --flavor generic --language en --framework React --mainApiPath v6-/ovhCloudConnect --listingEndpointPath /ovhCloudConnect --dashboardEndpointPath /ovhCloudConnect --out "$OUT" && grep -E "serviceKey:[[:space:]]*'ovhCloudConnect'" "$OUT/src/App.constants.ts"

name: no v2/v6 lists → default listing v6Iceberg
cmd:
OUT="{OUT}"; JSON_FILE=$(mktemp); cat > "$JSON_FILE" <<'JSON'
{"apiV6Endpoints":{"get":{"operationList":[]}},"apiV2Endpoints":{"get":{"operationList":[]}}}
JSON
export MGR_GEN_INJECT_JSON="$(cat "$JSON_FILE")"; yarn manager-generator --non-interactive --appName nolists --appType full --universe Manager --subUniverse Manager --region EU --flavor generic --language en --framework React --mainApiPath /me --listingEndpointPath /me --dashboardEndpointPath /me --out "$OUT" && grep -E "listingApi:[[:space:]]*'v6Iceberg'" "$OUT/src/App.constants.ts"; RC=$?; rm -f "$JSON_FILE"; exit $RC
